next_decision.rationale: slot and normalized_command residual fields dominate, so the next phase should inspect clusters before choosing data design or paired SFT retry

tiers.interpretation: schema-valid JSON is stable on both scaled held-out splits
task_type and route errors exist but are no longer the dominant residual source
gold stop recall remains complete; one extra test stop affects precision
confirmation errors are comparatively small in this scaled baseline
strict slot mismatch dominates scaled-boundary residuals
full-contract exact remains far from recovery on the scaled manifest
